title: get_health_check_status
description: Verify that GET /health returns status 200 with {"status":"ok"} when the service is running.

title: post_api_auth_register_new_user
description: Test POST /api/auth/register with valid email and password returns 201 with JWT token and user object.

title: post_api_auth_login_valid_credentials
description: Test POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns 200 with JWT token and user object.

title: get_api_me_authenticated_user
description: Verify GET /api/me with valid Bearer token returns 200 with current authenticated user profile.

title: post_api_sites_create_site
description: Test POST /api/sites with valid name, unique domain, options, and locales returns 201 with created site and default pages/locales.

title: get_api_sites_list_sites
description: Verify GET /api/sites returns 200 with paginated and optionally filtered list of sites.

title: put_api_sites_id_update_site
description: Test PUT /api/sites/:id with locale query and updated name/domain/options returns 200 with updated site.

title: put_api_sites_id_live_set_site_live
description: Verify PUT /api/sites/:id/live sets the site as live and returns 200 with site object.

title: post_api_sites_id_locales_add_locale
description: Test POST /api/sites/:id/locales with locale code and is_default adds a locale and returns 201 with created locale object.

title: post_api_sites_id_pages_create_page
description: Verify POST /api/sites/:id/pages with locale, type, slugs, and layout creates a page and returns 201 with resolved layout.
